items.title: Voice research: 20-50 successful YA fantasy author socials → bible/AUTHOR_VOICE_GUIDE.md
items.rationale: Mine 20-50 high-engagement YA-fantasy author Twitter/Instagram/TikTok posts. Distill cadence, hook patterns, persona signals, taboo phrases. Output bible/AUTHOR_VOICE_GUIDE.md as the canonical voice contract every later post fixture is gated against.

items.title: First post emit: markdown + Django Post fixture + share_link.md
items.rationale: End-to-end smoke: produce one post (Spark launch teaser) as markdown source + Django fixture (apps/marketing/fixtures/marketing_posts_001.json) + share_link.md. Captain validator runs fixture FK gate; admiral copy-pastes share_link to a real platform.

items.title: Render verification: confirm post renders at chadacys.com/posts/<slug>
items.rationale: Wire a public_pages route + template that consumes the Post fixture and renders at /posts/<slug>. Verify by curl + visual; this is what cw-gateway will route to when the marketing site goes live.

items.title: 4-week launch series content plan (12+ posts)
items.rationale: Plan + draft 12+ posts covering the Spark launch ramp (T-28 → launch day → T+7). Each post is its own fixture; captain dispatches them as per-post slices in fb-005.

items.title: Per-post dispatch (1 post per slice, recurring)
items.rationale: Once fb-004's plan exists, captain auto-replans into per-post slices (one Post fixture per slice). posts_queue_depth scorecard tracks burndown; admiral approves render before share_link.md gets published.
